title: The Long-Distance Relationship
content: After Olivia accepted a new job in another city, she and Liam decided to continue their relationship despite the distance. They scheduled video calls, watched movies together online, and surprised each other with handwritten letters. Some days were difficult, especially when they wanted a simple hug after a stressful day. Still, every visit reminded them why they kept trying. Instead of focusing on the miles between them, they celebrated every reunion. Over time, they learned that trust, communication, and patience could keep two hearts close even when they lived hundreds of kilometers apart.
